```json
{
  "analysis": "INDEX-MATCH formulas have been successfully created for the expression data in cells C11:L20. The formulas will look up the expression values for each protein in the Data sheet based on the protein ID and sample name.",
  "plan": "Next, I will create formulas for the statistics (mean and standard deviation) for the control and treated groups. I will use the AVERAGE and STDEV functions in Excel to calculate these statistics.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
from openpyxl import load_workbook

# Load the workbook
wb = load_workbook('protein_expression.xlsx')
ws_task = wb['Task']

# Create formulas for control mean and standard deviation
for col in range(3, 13):  # Columns C-L
    col_letter = chr(64 + col)  # Convert column number to letter
    ws_task.cell(24, col).value = f'=AVERAGE({col_letter}11:{col_letter}15)'
    ws_task.cell(25, col).value = f'=STDEV({col_letter}11:{col_letter}15)'

# Create formulas for treated mean and standard deviation
for col in range(3, 13):  # Columns C-L
    col_letter = chr(64 + col)  # Convert column number to letter
    ws_task.cell(26, col).value = f'=AVERAGE({col_letter}16:{col_letter}20)'
    ws_task.cell(27, col).value = f'=STDEV({col_letter}16:{col_letter}20)'

wb.save('protein_expression.xlsx')
print("File saved.")
EOF
",
      "duration": 1.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
```
